comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Triage result: 2 low-severity alerts in rust/Cargo.lock. Planned remediation: (1) bump pyo3/pythonize to 0.24.x to address GHSA-pph8-gcv7-4qj5, (2) remove tempdir dev-dependency to eliminate remove_dir_all from the lockfile for GHSA-mc8h-8q98-g5hr. Will verify with cargo tests and make check before closure.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Completed Dependabot remediation for rust/Cargo.lock. Fixed pyo3 advisory via dependency upgrade and removed remove_dir_all path by dropping tempdir. Verification: make check passed on 2026-03-11 (100% Rust coverage; parity OK).
